rationale: The citing paper explicitly reports moderation analyses in later studies ("Studies 6–10 test moderation"), and the cited paper is a methodological guide on simple-effects testing in moderated regression (spotlight/floodlight and Johnson–Neyman), making it a plausible methods source rather than a generic mention. Although the raw evidence is only a DOI-level match (reference index 65) with no local quote, this pair is not safely droppable as incidental.
